title: Amazon Redshift Cluster
description: Schema for an Amazon Redshift provisioned cluster resource, representing a fully managed petabyte-scale data warehouse in the AWS cloud. Includes cluster configuration, networking, security, and operational metadata as described in the Amazon Redshift Management Guide.

ClusterIdentifier.description: The unique identifier of the cluster. Must be lowercase, begin with a letter, contain only alphanumeric characters and hyphens, and be between 1 and 63 characters.

ClusterStatus.description: The current state of the cluster

ClusterAvailabilityStatus.description: The availability status of the cluster for queries

NodeType.description: The node type for the nodes in the cluster

NumberOfNodes.description: The number of compute nodes in the cluster. For single-node clusters this is 1.

ClusterType.description: The type of the cluster based on number of nodes

DBName.description: The name of the initial database created when the cluster was provisioned. Default is 'dev'.

MasterUsername.description: The admin user name for the cluster. Must be lowercase, begin with a letter, contain only alphanumeric characters, and be between 1 and 128 characters.

ClusterCreateTime.description: The date and time that the cluster was created

AutomatedSnapshotRetentionPeriod.description: The number of days that automatic cluster snapshots are retained. Default is 1.

ManualSnapshotRetentionPeriod.description: The default number of days to retain a manual snapshot. -1 means indefinitely.

ClusterSecurityGroups.description: List of cluster security groups associated with the cluster

VpcSecurityGroups.description: List of VPC security groups associated with the cluster

ClusterParameterGroups.description: List of cluster parameter groups associated with this cluster

ClusterSubnetGroupName.description: The name of the subnet group associated with the cluster

VpcId.description: The identifier of the VPC the cluster is in

AvailabilityZone.description: The name of the Availability Zone in which the cluster is located

PreferredMaintenanceWindow.description: The weekly time range for system maintenance in UTC, formatted as ddd:hh24:mi-ddd:hh24:mi

ClusterVersion.description: The version ID of the Amazon Redshift engine running on the cluster

AllowVersionUpgrade.description: Whether major version upgrades are applied automatically during the maintenance window

PubliclyAccessible.description: Whether the cluster can be accessed from a public network

Encrypted.description: Whether data in the cluster is encrypted at rest

KmsKeyId.description: The AWS KMS key ID used for encryption of data at rest

EnhancedVpcRouting.description: Whether enhanced VPC routing is enabled, forcing all COPY and UNLOAD traffic through the VPC

IamRoles.description: List of IAM roles associated with the cluster for authorization

MaintenanceTrackName.description: The name of the maintenance track for the cluster

ElasticResizeNumberOfNodeOptions.description: The number of nodes that you can resize the cluster to using elastic resize

TotalStorageCapacityInMegaBytes.description: The total storage capacity of the cluster in megabytes

ClusterNamespaceArn.description: The namespace ARN of the cluster

Address.description: The DNS address of the cluster endpoint

Port.description: The port that the database engine is listening on

VpcEndpoints.description: List of VPC endpoints for the cluster

PrivateIpAddress.description: The private IP address of the interface

ClusterSecurityGroupMembership.description: Describes a cluster security group membership

ClusterSecurityGroupName.description: The name of the cluster security group

Status.description: The status of the cluster security group

VpcSecurityGroupMembership.description: Describes a VPC security group membership

VpcSecurityGroupId.description: The identifier of the VPC security group

Status.description: The status of the VPC security group

ClusterParameterGroupStatus.description: Describes the status of a cluster parameter group

ParameterGroupName.description: The name of the cluster parameter group

ParameterApplyType.description: The apply type of the parameter

ClusterIamRole.description: An IAM role associated with the cluster

IamRoleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role

ApplyStatus.description: The status of the IAM role association

AquaConfiguration.description: AQUA (Advanced Query Accelerator) configuration for the cluster

AquaStatus.description: The value represents how the cluster is configured for using AQUA

Tag.description: A tag consisting of a key-value pair

Key.description: The key of the tag. Maximum 128 Unicode characters.

Value.description: The value of the tag. Maximum 256 Unicode characters.
